name: Devansh Trivedi
address: Plot 11, HSR Layout Sector 2, Bengaluru, Karnataka - 560102
summary: Full-stack Software Engineer with 2 years of experience building scalable microservices and React-based SaaS products. Contributed to systems handling 1M+ daily requests at Flipkart. Open-source contributor with 1.2K GitHub stars. Passionate about clean architecture, performance engineering, and developer experience.

experience.title: Software Development Engineer I (SDE-I)
responsibilities: Designed and built a high-throughput event-driven microservice (Kafka + Java Spring Boot) for real-time inventory synchronization across 400+ warehouse nodes, reducing stock discrepancy by 34%.
Re-architected the search results caching layer using Redis Cluster, cutting P99 latency from 380ms to 95ms for 1M+ daily active users.
Led migration of 3 legacy REST APIs to GraphQL with schema federation, reducing over-fetching by 60% on mobile clients.
Mentored 2 intern engineers through 12-week projects; both received return offers.
Achieved 92% unit test coverage across 6 owned microservices; led team's shift to TDD practices.

experience.title: Software Engineer Intern
responsibilities: Built an internal dashboard for Azure DevOps pipeline visibility using React and TypeScript.
Reduced manual reporting effort by 8 hours/week through automated metrics aggregation.
Received Pre-Placement Offer (PPO) — declined in favour of Flipkart.

projects.name: OpenExpense – Open Source Expense Tracker API
projects.description: Maintained open-source expense management REST API with 1.2K GitHub stars and 40+ contributors. Implemented OAuth2 login, multi-currency support, and Telegram bot integration.

projects.name: ScaleQ – Distributed Task Queue
projects.description: Built a lightweight distributed task queue library for Python. Published on PyPI with 300+ weekly downloads. Used in 3 production systems at small startups.

achievements: Promoted to SDE-I Band 2 within 18 months (top 5% of batch) at Flipkart
Speaker at Bengaluru Java User Group (JUG) — talk on Kafka Exactly-Once Semantics
BITS Merit Scholarship recipient — all 4 years
Finalist — Smart India Hackathon 2021 (team of 6, national level)
